whatWasImplemented: Generates a new 32-char hex site_key via crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex'), matching the existing default shape.

UPDATEs sites scoped by user_id = auth.uid() and returns the new key. Old key is immediately invalid — widget calls resolve site by site_key, so the stale key yields zero rows (production chat/session already returns 401 on missing site).
Returns 404 when the user has no site (PGRST116 from PostgREST), 500 on other DB errors.

Per-user rate limit: 5 rotations/hour (in-memory Map). 6th call returns 429 with Retry-After header. Isolated from the chat/leads limiter; state lives in src/lib/sites/rotation-rate-limit.ts. M8 will migrate to Upstash.
Unit tests in src/__tests__/site-key-rotation.test.ts (6 tests — auth, happy path, hex shape, 404 no-site, rate limit, per-user scoping).

Integration test in src/__tests__/site-key-rotation-integration.test.ts — lookup by old key returns the site pre-rotation; after rotation, old key misses and new key hits. Exercises real local Supabase (gates on SUPABASE_TEST_URL).
whatWasLeftUndone: UI integration with /dashboard/settings/site (VAL-SET-005 button that calls this endpoint) lives in M4 settings-sidebar — separate feature.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 185 passed / 1 skipped / 26 files (7 new tests).
